Property.Name: SalesOrderTypeInternalCode
Property.sap:label: Language key
Property.sap:quickinfo: Language key for sales document type

Property.Name: CreatedByUser
Property.sap:label: Created By
Property.sap:quickinfo: Name of Person Responsible for Creating the Object

Property.Name: LastChangeDateTime
Property.sap:label: Time Stamp
Property.sap:quickinfo: UTC Time Stamp in Long Form (YYYYMMDDhhmmssmmmuuun)

Property.Name: ExternalDocLastChangeDateTime
Property.sap:label: External Revision
Property.sap:quickinfo: Timestamp for Revision of External Calls

Property.Name: TotalNetAmount
Property.sap:label: Net Value
Property.sap:quickinfo: Net Value of the Sales Document in Document Currency

Property.Name: SDDocumentReason
Property.sap:label: Order Reason
Property.sap:quickinfo: Order Reason (Reason for the Business Transaction)

Property.Name: PricingDate
Property.sap:label: Pricing Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date for Pricing and Exchange Rate

Property.Name: BillingPlan
Property.sap:label: Bill. Plan No.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Billing Plan Number / Invoicing Plan Number

Property.Name: CompleteDeliveryIsDefined
Property.sap:label: Complete Delivery
Property.sap:quickinfo: Complete Delivery Defined for Each Sales Order

Property.Name: AccountingExchangeRate
Property.sap:label: Exchng. Rate Accntg.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Exchange Rate for Postings to Financial Accounting

Property.Name: ServicesRenderedDate
Property.sap:label: Date of Services Rendered
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date on which services are rendered

Property.Name: BillingPlanStartDateRule
Property.sap:label: Origin of Start Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Rule for Origin of Start Date of Billing/Invoicing Plan

Property.Name: ReferenceBillingPlan
Property.sap:quickinfo: Reference Billing Plan Number / Invoicing Plan Number

Property.Name: BillingPlanEndDateRule
Property.sap:label: Origin End Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Rule for Origin of End Date for Billing/Invoicing Plan

Property.Name: BillingPlanItem
Property.sap:quickinfo: Item for billing plan/invoice plan/payment cards

Property.Name: BillingPlanAmount
Property.sap:label: Billing Value
Property.sap:quickinfo: Value to be billed/calc. on date in billing/invoice plan

Property.Name: BillingPlanAmountPercent
Property.sap:label: Invoice Percentage
Property.sap:quickinfo: Percentage of value to be invoiced

Property.Name: ProposedBillingDocumentType
Property.sap:label: Billing Type
Property.sap:quickinfo: Proposed Billing Type for an Order-Related Billing Document

Property.Name: BillingBlockReason
Property.sap:label: Billing Block
Property.sap:quickinfo: Billing Block for Billing/Invoicing Plan Date

Property.Name: BillingPlanServiceStartDate
Property.sap:label: Settlement Start Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Settlement Start Date of Billing/Invoicing Date

Property.Name: BillingPlanServiceEndDate
Property.sap:label: Settlement End Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Settlement End Date of Billing/Invoicing Date

Property.Name: BillingPlanRelatedBillgStatus
Property.sap:label: Billing Status
Property.sap:quickinfo: Billing Status for Billing/Invoicing Plan Date

Property.Name: BillgPlnDteCorrectionRfndType
Property.sap:label: Correction Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator for Correction Date in Billing Plan

Property.Name: ConditionQuantitySAPUnit
Property.sap:label: SAP Condition Qty
Property.sap:quickinfo: SAP Unit Code for Condition Quantity

Property.Name: ConditionQuantityISOUnit
Property.sap:label: ISO Condition Qty
Property.sap:quickinfo: ISO Unit Code for Condition Quantity

Property.Name: ConditionCategory
Property.sap:label: Condition Category
Property.sap:quickinfo: Condition Category (Examples: Tax, Freight, Price, Cost)

Property.Name: HigherLevelItem
Property.sap:label: Higher-Level Item
Property.sap:quickinfo: Higher-Level Item in Bill of Material Structures

Property.Name: SalesOrderItemText
Property.sap:label: Item Description
Property.sap:quickinfo: Short Text for Sales Order Item

Property.Name: UnderlyingPurchaseOrderItem
Property.sap:label: Purchase Order Item
Property.sap:quickinfo: Item Number of the Underlying Purchase Order

Property.Name: PricingDate
Property.sap:label: Pricing Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date for Pricing and Exchange Rate

Property.Name: BillingPlan
Property.sap:label: Bill. Plan No.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Billing Plan Number / Invoicing Plan Number

Property.Name: RequestedQuantitySAPUnit
Property.sap:label: SAP Code Req. Qty
Property.sap:quickinfo: SAP Unit Code for Requested Quantity

Property.Name: RequestedQuantityISOUnit
Property.sap:label: ISO Code Req. Qty
Property.sap:quickinfo: ISO Unit Code for Requested Quantity

Property.Name: OrderQuantitySAPUnit
Property.sap:label: SAP Order Quantity
Property.sap:quickinfo: SAP Unit Code for Order Quantity

Property.Name: OrderQuantityISOUnit
Property.sap:label: ISO Order Quantity
Property.sap:quickinfo: ISO Unit Code for Order Quantity

Property.Name: ConfdDelivQtyInOrderQtyUnit
Property.sap:label: Confirmed Quantity
Property.sap:quickinfo: Cumulative Confirmed Quantity in Sales Unit

Property.Name: ItemWeightSAPUnit
Property.sap:label: SAP Code Item Weight
Property.sap:quickinfo: SAP Unit Code for Item Weight

Property.Name: ItemWeightISOUnit
Property.sap:label: ISO Code Item Weight
Property.sap:quickinfo: ISO Unit Code for Item Weight

Property.Name: ItemVolumeSAPUnit
Property.sap:label: SAP Code f Item Vol.
Property.sap:quickinfo: SAP Unit Code for Item Volume

Property.Name: ItemVolumeISOUnit
Property.sap:label: ISO Unit Item Volume
Property.sap:quickinfo: ISO Unit Code for Item Volume

Property.Name: NetAmount
Property.sap:label: Net Value
Property.sap:quickinfo: Net Value of the Document Item in Document Currency

Property.Name: ServicesRenderedDate
Property.sap:label: Date of Services Rendered
Property.sap:quickinfo: Date on which services are rendered

Property.Name: SalesDocumentRjcnReason
Property.sap:label: Reason for Rejection
Property.sap:quickinfo: Reason for Rejection of Sales Documents

Property.Name: AccountingExchangeRate
Property.sap:label: Exchng. Rate Accntg.
Property.sap:quickinfo: Exchange Rate for Postings to Financial Accounting

Property.Name: ReferenceSDDocumentItem
Property.sap:label: Reference Item
Property.sap:quickinfo: Item Number of the Reference Item

Property.Name: Subtotal1Amount
Property.sap:label: Subtotal 1
Property.sap:quickinfo: Subtotal 1 from Pricing Procedure for Price Element

Property.Name: Subtotal2Amount
Property.sap:label: Subtotal 2
Property.sap:quickinfo: Subtotal 2 from Pricing Procedure for Price Element

Property.sap:label: Subtotal 5
Property.sap:quickinfo: Subtotal 5 from Pricing Procedure for Price Element

Property.Name: Subtotal6Amount
Property.sap:label: Subtotal 6
Property.sap:quickinfo: Subtotal 6 from Pricing Procedure for Price Element

Property.Name: BillingPlanIsInHeader
Property.sap:label: Header Billing Plan
Property.sap:quickinfo: Indicator for Billing Plan on Header

Property.Name: BillingPlanStartDateRule
Property.sap:label: Origin of Start Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Rule for Origin of Start Date of Billing/Invoicing Plan

Property.Name: ReferenceBillingPlan
Property.sap:quickinfo: Reference Billing Plan Number / Invoicing Plan Number

Property.Name: BillingPlanEndDateRule
Property.sap:label: Origin End Date
Property.sap:quickinfo: Rule for Origin of End Date for Billing/Invoicing Plan

Property.Name: SalesOrderItem
Property.sap:label: Item (SD)
Property.sap:quickinfo: Item number of the SD document

Property.Name: TransportZone
Property.sap:label: Transportation Zone
Property.sap:quickinfo: Transportation zone to or from which the goods are delivered

Property.sap:quickinfo: Telephone No.: Dialing Code and Number

Property.sap:quickinfo: Condition is Relevant for Accrual (e.g. Freight)

Schema.EntityType: <Property Name="OrderQuantitySAPUnit" Type="Edm.String" MaxLength="3" sap:label="SAP Order Quantity" sap:quickinfo="SAP Unit Code for Order Quantity" sap:semanti
